</Response> It has sequential read and write speeds, is shockproof, operates silently, consumes low power, and supports trim.

</Response> The packaging indicates it's a 2.5-inch SATA 6Gb/s solid state drive with 128GB capacity, includes a 3.5-bracket, has a 'SATA III 6Gb/s' label, and a red 'Editor's Choice' sticker. One side features branding, Transcend's System Clone software (with visual aids and text explaining data transfer from HDD to SSD) and a QR code. The back displays specifications and sequential read/write speeds, while another side highlights shockproof, silent operation, low power consumption, trim support, with branding and key features prominently shown.
</Response> The packaging is shown being unboxed, with hands cutting through and peeling back the plastic covering, revealing the box's design including branding and storage capacity information.
Q: What items are included with the Transcend SSD 370S?
</Response> 8 screws for the 3.5-inch desktop bracket are included.
</Response> A quick installation guide, a warranty card, and several pamphlets advertising other Transcend multimedia products are included.
